data.name: ClaimNotFoundTitle
data.comment: Error title when claim does not exist

data.name: ClaimNotFoundDetail
data.value: The requested claim could not be found.
data.comment: Error detail when claim does not exist

data.name: AuthenticationRequiredTitle
data.comment: Error title for unauthenticated requests

data.name: AuthenticationRequiredDetail
data.value: The current request does not have a valid authenticated user.
data.comment: Error detail for unauthenticated requests

data.name: ConcurrencyConflictTitle
data.comment: Error title for concurrent modification conflicts

data.name: ConcurrencyConflictDetail
data.value: The claim has been modified by another user. Please reload the claim and try again.
data.comment: Error detail for concurrent modification conflicts

data.name: InvalidWorkflowTransitionTitle
data.comment: Error title for invalid state transitions

data.name: InvalidWorkflowTransitionDetail
data.comment: Error detail for invalid state transitions, includes exception message

data.name: ClaimCreationConflictTitle
data.comment: Error title when claim number generation fails

data.name: ClaimCreationConflictDetail
data.value: The claim number could not be reserved. Please retry the request.
data.comment: Error detail when claim number generation fails

data.name: RetryNotAllowedTitle
data.comment: Error title when notification retry is not available

data.name: RetryNotAllowedDetail
data.value: Cannot retry a notification in '{0}' state. Only failed notifications can be retried.
data.comment: Error detail when notification retry is not available

data.name: NotificationNotFoundTitle
data.comment: Error title when notification does not exist

data.name: NotificationNotFoundDetail
data.value: The requested notification could not be found for this claim.
data.comment: Error detail when notification does not exist

data.name: PolicyNotFoundMessage
data.value: Policy not found for the recorded policy number.
data.comment: Message when policy system cannot find the policy

data.name: PolicySystemErrorMessage
data.value: Policy system was unreachable or returned an unexpected error: {0}
data.comment: Message when policy system is unavailable, includes error message

data.name: PaymentSystemErrorMessage
data.value: Payment system was unreachable or returned an unexpected error: {0}
data.comment: Message when payment system is unavailable, includes error message

data.name: DocumentSystemErrorMessage
data.value: Document repository was unreachable or returned an unexpected error: {0}
data.comment: Message when document repository is unavailable, includes error message

data.name: MessagingClientErrorMessage
data.value: Messaging client threw an unexpected error: {0}
data.comment: Message when messaging client fails, includes error message

data.name: DeliveryFailedWithoutReasonMessage
data.comment: Message when message delivery fails without details

data.name: ClaimCreatedAuditMessage
data.value: Claim file created with claimant, claim, and loss information.
data.comment: Audit message when claim is created

data.name: PolicySyncedAuditMessage
data.comment: Audit message when policy sync succeeds, includes sync details

data.name: PolicySyncFailedAuditMessage
data.comment: Audit message when policy sync fails, includes failure reason

data.name: PaymentSyncFailedAuditMessage
data.comment: Audit message when payment sync fails, includes failure reason

data.name: DocumentSyncFailedAuditMessage
data.comment: Audit message when document sync fails, includes failure reason

data.name: NoteAddedAuditMessage
data.comment: Audit message when a claim note is added, includes note preview

data.name: DocumentUploadedAuditMessage
data.comment: Audit message when document is uploaded, includes filename and type

data.name: WorkflowAdvancedAuditMessage
data.comment: Audit message when workflow advances, includes workflow details

data.name: ClaimRoutedForApprovalAuditMessage
data.value: Claim routed for payment approval. Rationale: {0}
data.comment: Audit message when claim is routed for approval, includes rationale

data.name: NotificationSentAuditMessage
data.value: Outbound {0} notification sent via {1} to {2}. Delivery ID: {3}.
data.comment: Audit message when notification is sent successfully, includes type, channel, recipient, delivery ID

data.name: NotificationFailedAuditMessage
data.value: Outbound {0} notification failed via {1} to {2}. Reason: {3}
data.comment: Audit message when notification delivery fails, includes type, channel, recipient, failure reason

data.name: NotificationRetrySucceededAuditMessage
data.value: Retry of {0} notification succeeded via {1} to {2}. Delivery ID: {3}.
data.comment: Audit message when notification retry succeeds, includes type, channel, recipient, delivery ID

data.name: NotificationRetryFailedAuditMessage
data.value: Retry of {0} notification failed via {1} to {2}. Reason: {3}
data.comment: Audit message when notification retry fails, includes type, channel, recipient, failure reason

data.name: ClaimReconciledAuditMessage
data.comment: Audit message when claim is reconciled, includes reconciliation details

data.name: ClaimReviewedNoChangesAuditMessage
data.value: Claim file reviewed with no material changes.
data.comment: Audit message when claim is reviewed with no changes

data.name: FieldUpdatedAuditMessage
data.comment: Audit message for field updates, includes field name, old value, new value

data.name: LossDateUpdatedAuditMessage
data.comment: Audit message for loss date updates, includes old and new dates

data.name: ReconciliationStartMessage
data.comment: Start of reconciliation message, includes dependencies being retried

data.name: ReconciliationNoDependenciesRecoveredMessage
data.value: No previously unresolved dependencies were recovered during this attempt.
data.comment: Message when no dependencies are recovered during reconciliation

data.name: ReconciliationDependenciesRecoveredMessage
data.comment: Message when dependencies are recovered, includes list of recovered dependencies

data.name: ReconciliationAllResolvedMessage
data.value: All claim integration dependencies are now aligned.
data.comment: Message when all dependencies are resolved

data.name: ReconciliationStillUnresolvedMessage
data.comment: Message when some dependencies remain unresolved, includes list of unresolved dependencies

data.name: DependencyNamePolicy
data.comment: Display name for policy dependency

data.name: DependencyNamePayment
data.comment: Display name for payment dependency

data.name: DependencyNameDocuments
data.comment: Display name for documents dependency
